intent: Initial build of Morpheus Agent plugin — data wallet for Morpheus AI agents with birth certificate, action logging, code delivery, and wallet-watch

files.summary: All type definitions: BirthCertificate, ActionNote variants, CodeDeliveryNote, SettlementNote, MorpheusConfig, API types
OpenAI-compatible HTTP client for Morpheus inference API with hash-based action logging
Core agent lifecycle: create (birth cert), work (inference+logging), watch (wallet polling), settle (Merkle root)
5 MCP tools: create_agent, inference, status, deliver_code, settle
Entry point with CLI args, MCP server startup, graceful shutdown
Vision document explaining the data wallet concept for Morpheus
Package config with V6 workspace dependencies
